column1: # config/access_groups.tsv — record-level access groups for the SysBio-CDM governance layer.
# One group per AMP PROGRAM (the real, always-available access signal; access model = file-driven,
# program fallback, per the approved plan). Every governed row (observation / measurement / specimen /
# files / procedure) is tagged into the group of its file's program, else its person's program.
#   * id             — fixed integer PK (referenced by user_access_groups + <entity>_access; never serial).
#   * program        — the AMP program label; matches files.study and the person's program for the join.
#   * disease_focus  — factual scope of the program (the acronym's meaning), NOT invented policy.
#   * dul / data_access_instructions — LEFT BLANK: real AMP data-use-limitation text is not in-repo; we
#     invent none. The mechanism carries them; a future real policy drop fills them.
# created_at is a constant stamped by scripts/12_render_governance.py (determinism; never now()).

column6: Kidney, muscle and adipose metabolic disease

column6: Rheumatoid arthritis and systemic lupus erythematosus
